---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Feature summary

A short, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation / use case

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, and who is affected? Link to related issues or discussions if any.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Be as specific as you can — UI changes, new component props, exporter behavior, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Mockups, references, related projects, or any other context that would help evaluate this request.
